news_items.headline: 'Legend': Players, coaches mourn Bobby Cox, 84
news_items.summary: On Saturday, MLB players and coaches remembered late manager Bobby Cox, who died at 84.

news_items.headline: Phils remove Harper in first inning with migraine
news_items.summary: First baseman Bryce Harper, who has played in all 40 games this season, was removed by the Philadelphia Phillies in the bottom of the first inning of his team's 9-3 win over the Colorado Rockies on Saturday night with what the team said was a migraine.

news_items.headline: Guardians land Gold Glove C Bailey from Giants
news_items.summary: The Guardians have acquired catcher Patrick Bailey from the Giants in return for the No. 29 pick in this year's MLB draft and pitching prospect Matt Wilkinson.

news_items.headline: Twins RHP Bradley out with pectoral inflammation
news_items.summary: Twins right-hander Taj Bradley was placed on the 15-day injured list Saturday with right pectoral inflammation, retroactive to Wednesday.

news_items.headline: Giants ace Webb heads to IL with knee bursitis
news_items.summary: Giants starter Logan Webb has been put on the 15-day injured list Saturday because of right knee bursitis after struggling with knee discomfort in his last start, a 10-5 loss to the San Diego Padres.

news_items.headline: Brewers' Lockridge to IL after slamming into wall
news_items.summary: Brewers outfielder Brandon Lockridge has been placed on the injured list after he crashed into the side wall while chasing a foul ball.

news_items.headline: White Sox scratch OF Benintendi (neck) from lineup...
news_items.summary: White Sox outfielder Andrew Benintendi, 31, slated to serve as the designated hitter in what turned out to be a 6-1 win over the Seattle Mariners on Saturday, was scratched from the lineup because of neck stiffness.

news_items.headline: Game Thread: Happy Mother’s Day, y’all!
news_items.summary: Too bad this day will always be associated with Dallas Braden for me.

news_items.headline: Strider in vintage form as Braves honor Cox with big win over Dodgers
The last Padre with a 4-K frame before Miller? His manager
Tough luck, strong results: Clay Holmes shines again despite Mets' 2-1 loss
news_items.summary: Clay Holmes continued his strong season as a starter, allowing two runs over 5.2 IP in the New York Mets' 2-1 loss at the Arizona Diamondbacks.

news_items.headline: Blake Snell gets no help from the Dodgers' offense in loss to Braves
news_items.summary: Blake Snell is shaky in his season debut, giving up four earned runs for a Dodgers team that struggled at the plate in a 7-2 loss to the Atlanta Braves.

news_items.headline: Witt hits inside-the-park HR ... on a ground ball
Spencer Strider superb as Braves take down Dodgers, 7-2
news_items.summary: Behind a stellar performance from Spencer Strider and an opportunistic offensive attack early, the Braves shook off their Dodger Stadium demons for at least one night to even up the series with a 7-2 win. Strider became the story on Saturday night, working six nearly perfect shutout innings. His slider was virtually un-hittable with a […]

news_items.headline: Blake Snell struggles in season debut, Braves defeat Dodgers 7-2
news_items.summary: Snell allows five runs (four earned) over three innings, Dodgers score two late runs to avoid shut out loss.

news_items.headline: Hats off to all the Major League moms on Mother's Day
Twins 2, Guardians 1 – F/11: Genuinely How
news_items.summary: The Twins had two hits in eleven innings and won a baseball game at Progressive Field. Sure, man. Good team or no good team, the Buck Truck keeps rolling, as evidenced by Byron’s leadoff blast to left field in a rain-delayed Saturday night game against the Cleveland Guardians. Buxton’s bomb, his 13th of the year, […]
